t_ch: 联觉信标也好了？他宝贝的太宝了个贝的好啦！宝贝！
t_en: My Synesthesia Beacon's back to normal? Dagnabbit, that's forkin' amazing! Hot diggity fudge!

t_ch: 咦？意思是说，你把这东西打烂后，就立刻恢复正常了？
t_en: Huh? So you're saying everything went back to normal once you smashed this thing to pieces?

t_ch: 哦，难怪那些助蕉要一对一教学……
t_en: I see. No wonder those Assistananas only want to teach students one on one...

t_ch: 我就知道，有时候事情就是简单得要命，人犯不着那么聪明。
t_en: I had a hunch, sometimes it's just dead simple, don't gotta be a genius.

t_ch: 走吧，无名客，用不着叫援兵了，既然四处开枪就能解决这档子事儿……
t_en: Follow me, Nameless. No need for reinforcements, seein' as how a few bullets will clear this up...

t_ch: 他宝贝的，匹诺康尼还能有人比我更擅长？
t_en: Forkin' hell, you think you can find a better shot than me in Penacony?

t_ch: 波提欧先生，现在见面可还不是时候。
t_en: It's not yet time for us to meet, Mr. Boothill.

t_ch: 是你啊，过来，小可爱！
t_en: It's you? Get over here, you shirthead!

t_ch: 没错，各位社员，接下来将要发生的一切并非终结。
t_en: That's right, fellow members. Everything that's about to happen next isn't the end for us.

t_ch: 以流梦礁作为起点，美丽的世界将会降临，而他的目光，也会投向我们一同铸就的伟业。
t_en: With Dreamflux Reef as our starting point, a beautiful world shall descend upon all. And he will eventually cast his gaze upon us and the grand cause that we've forged together.

t_ch: 伟大在哪儿了？小可爱？
t_en: Grand...? Grand in what way, muddle-fudger?

t_ch: 来！都朝我看！我就明说了吧，这就是个宝贝的阴谋。
t_en: Alright, folks! Eyes on me! Now listen here: This whole thing is a muddle-fudgin' scheme!

t_ch: 现在都躲远点，犯傻无所谓，识相点儿。
t_en: Go, scurry off and hide. Ain't no harm in bein' foolish, but know when to steer clear.

t_ch: 又是你们，之前的事也就算了，但在普利蒙蕉授面前诋毁睡蕉小猴…你们知道自己在干什么吗？
t_en: You two again? I can forget everything else you've done, but slandering the name of Slumbernana Monkey before Profnana Primon? Do you even know what you're doing?

t_ch: 蒙塔娜，你听我说啦。
t_en: Montana, would you please just hear me out?

t_ch: 得了吧，你怎么还觉得他们能听进去？
t_en: Save it. You really think you can still convince them?

t_ch: 游侠先生，或许回归原始……
t_en: Mr. Ranger, perhaps going back to our origins—

t_ch: 谁问你了？话我只说一遍——你有什么哲学和苦衷我都懒得听。
t_en: Who asked you? I'm only gonna say this once — I ain't interested in hearin' your philosophies or sob stories.

t_ch: 你是个狡诈恶徒，你挨一枪一样会死，而我现在就握着那把枪。
t_en: You're a dastardly evildoer who'll cease to exist once a bullet's put into you. And guess what? I just so happen to be holdin' a gun right now.

t_ch: 既然所有的事都这么简单，那我也犯不着太聪明，懂了吧……
t_en: Since everything's turned out to be so simple, there's no need to use too much of my intellect. You catch my drift?

t_ch: 小可爱，我不是来给你们上课的……
t_en: See, I'm not here to teach a class, shirtbrain...

t_ch: 哎等等——你又要干嘛？
t_en: Hey, hold up! Where are you heading off to again?

t_ch: 这边！你怎么呆头呆脑的，没睡醒？
t_en: This way! Why do you seem so out of it? Haven't you woken up yet?

t_ch: 既然你修改过我的联觉信标，小可爱，附赠你个秘密。
t_en: I'll let you in on a secret, lil' fudgehead. For tampering with my Synesthesia Beacon.

t_ch: 我要一枪「爱」死你，这一句还真没被篡改过——我真这么觉得。
t_en: I'm gonna put a bullet in ya! And if you think this is the faulty Beacon talking, no shirtball, I actually mean it.

t_ch: 死亡是最公平的爱护，尤其是对你这种会越变越坏的小可爱。
t_en: Death is the fairest form of grace, especially for muddle-fudgers like you who'll only become worse forms of evil with time.

t_ch: 准备把这儿砸了吧！
t_en: Prepare to tear this place apart!

t_ch: 带我成为高级社员。
t_en: Help me become a high-ranking member.

t_ch: 声音就此远去——
t_en: The sound fades away—

t_ch: 可惜的是，感官隔绝得太快了些，他没能来得及听到少女的疑问，并以此重新斟酌自己的冒险。
t_en: Unfortunately, the sensory isolation happened too quickly. He didn't have time to hear the girl's question and reconsider his adventure.

t_ch: 「答案很简单，小姐，这位先生……」
t_en: "The answer is simple, Miss, this gentleman here..."

t_ch: 「比在场的任何人都更希望回到过去。」
t_en: "He wants to visit the past more than anyone else in the room."

t_ch: 什么香蕉意思，就这？
t_en: What's the big fudgin' idea here, is this all there is?

t_ch: 又见面了，先生。
t_en: We meet again, sir.

t_ch: 哼。我见过最破的酒吧也要比这儿气派，你们管这叫显圣？
t_en: Hmph. I've seen rundown saloons fancier than this place. You call this a theophany?

t_ch: 营造美好而又虚假的前景，那是拙劣的手段，和睡蕉小猴想要传达给人们的精神截然相反。
t_en: Crafting an attractive but deceptive vision is a crude method, entirely opposite to the values that the Slumbernana Monkey aims to share with people.

t_ch: 有很多社员到过这里，试图得到些什么，真理、幸福、平静…无非就是这些。
t_en: Many other members before you have come here seeking something. But these tend to be the usual... truth, happiness, peace, and the like.

t_ch: 可惜这里没有答案，只有一个疑问——「您会因此更加不幸吗？」
t_en: Unfortunately, there are no answers here, only one question: "Will this make you worse off?"

t_ch: 这都什么玩意儿？
t_en: What is this fudgin' nonsense?

t_ch: 别担心，我会细致地为您讲解。
t_en: Have patience. I will explain everything in detail.

s_en: Boothill: Just One Stalk of Malt
t_ch: 「可别来这套，经典就是经典。」
t_en: "Nuh-uh, don't pull that nonsense on me. A classic will always be a classic."

t_ch: 「话不能这么说，哥们，偶尔也要来点新的。」
t_en: "Now, hold on there, pardner. Sometimes you gotta try somethin' new."

t_ch: 无论何时，自我审视都至关重要。
t_en: Introspection is key, no matter the hour.

t_ch: 看——这就是面对这个问题，您脑海中浮现的思绪。可惜，无论怎么选，似乎都会留下遗憾。
t_en: You see, these are the thoughts that come to your mind when you were given that question. Sadly, it appears that whichever option you choose, there will be some lingering regret.

t_ch: 所以，我们来设想一种现实中不存在的情境——
t_en: With that, let's go on to imagine a scenario that doesn't hold true in reality...

t_ch: 就在两人的注视下，两道思绪瞬间消失，不留一丝痕迹……
t_en: Under the gaze of both, the two streams of thought vanishes instantly, leaving no trace behind...

t_ch: 如果那种对饮品的依赖从一开始就不存在，这个问题自然也不会产生，连带着因此产生的两种思绪也一并消失。
t_en: If the dependence on the drink was never there to begin with, this problem would naturally not exist, and the resulting thoughts would also disappear.

t_ch: 请问——「您会因此更加不幸吗？」
t_en: Here's a question: "Will this make you worse off?"

t_ch: （…他香蕉的，怎么回事？还真的一点想喝的念头都没了。）
t_en: (...Holy bananas, what's gotten into me? He's right, I don't have the urge to drink at all.)

t_ch: （敢这么乱翻我的脑子，难怪联觉信标会变成这鬼样。这破东西做不到这事，它背后的混蛋在哪？）
t_en: (Messin' around in my head like that, no wonder the Synesthesia Beacon's all screwed up. No, this busted thing can't do it alone. So who's the scoundrel behind all this?)

t_ch: 那可真是一道无穷无尽的怒火。
t_en: I see. That is one vast and endless wall of rage you have there.

t_ch: 既然知道，开口前就先过过脑子，别引火烧身，香蕉。
t_en: Since you know, think before you speak, don't go askin' for trouble, ya banana.

t_ch: 别心急，睡蕉小猴不会讲什么宽恕或放下的大道理，那实在令人生厌。
t_en: Calm yourself. Slumbernana Monkey wouldn't preach about forgiveness or burying the hatchet. Now that's something even I'd find annoying.

t_ch: 它当然会支持您亲手复仇，就像现在这样——
t_en: Instead, it'd support you taking vengeance into your own hands... Just like this—

t_ch: 感觉如何？
t_en: How do you feel?

t_ch: 废话，打假靶子会让你有兴致？
t_en: What a load of hogwash, you reckon takin' aim at phony targets is gonna get your blood pumpin'?

t_ch: 我理解。但解气向来能让人放松，而人在放松时，才更容易接受一些逆耳的忠言。
t_en: I understand, but venting your anger can help relieve the tension you built up. And when that happens, you'll be less averse to accepting unpalatable advice.

t_ch: 现在，和刚才一样，设想一种现实中不存在的情境——
t_en: Now, just like before, imagine a scenario that doesn't hold true in reality...

t_ch: 一个为了复仇而活着的人，如果失去了仇恨，会发生什么？
t_en: For a person who has made revenge their sole purpose in life, what would happen if their hatred were to vanish?

t_ch: 「您会因此更加不幸吗？」
t_en: "Will this make you worse off?"

t_ch: 他香蕉的，你到底在讲什么歪理？
t_en: Rottin' bananas, what wacky theory are you trying to prove?

t_ch: 但…怎么回事，我现在感觉还不赖。是呢，谁香蕉在乎？
t_en: Well... what the heck, I actually feel pretty good right now. Yeah... who banana fudgin' cares about revenge!?

t_ch: 很好，您真的很有悟性，那让我们继续下一堂课吧……
t_en: Excellent. You're very perceptive. Let's move on to the next lesson then...

t_ch: 巡海游侠。
t_en: ...Galaxy Ranger.

t_ch: 当然，我也明白，仇恨不是那么容易被抹去的事物。
t_en: I know very well hatred isn't something that can be easily erased.

t_ch: 这会是最艰难的一课，所以我会陪在你的身边。接下来……
t_en: This will be your toughest lesson, but I'll be with you throughout. Now then...

t_ch: 如果了断一切因缘，忘记你和世间的一切联系……
t_en: If you end all connections and forget everything that ties you to the world...

t_ch: 游侠先生，你会因此更加不幸吗？
t_en: Will this make you worse off, Mr. Ranger?

t_ch: 这是决定性的一刻，那个名为波提欧的男人心知肚明。
t_en: This is a decisive moment, and the man named Boothill knows it well.

t_ch: 或者…那个曾经名为波提欧的男人。
t_en: Or rather, the man that was once known as Boothill.

t_ch: 我…不太清楚你在说什么。不过…你看上去挺有意思。
t_en: I... ain't quite sure what you're talkin' about. But... you sure seem mighty fascinatin'.

t_ch: 初次见面，哥们，怎么称呼？
t_en: Nice to meet ya, pardner. What's your name?

t_ch: 虽然不是初次见面，不过……
t_en: This isn't the first time we've met, but...

t_ch: 你可以称我为「普利蒙蕉授」。
t_en: You can call me Profnana Primon.

t_ch: 呦——文化人？
t_en: Oh, a cultured soul then?

t_ch: 只是一介研究猿而已。
t_en: No, I'm just a research ape.

t_ch: 至于你…很快就会被我写进研究报告了。
t_en: And you... you'll soon be mentioned in my research report.

t_ch: 要摆平大学里的闹剧轻而易举，重点从来都是这里，流梦礁。如果不是为了抹杀你这个变数，我不必特意放慢脚步。
t_en: Handling the commotion at the university is easy, the main concern has always been here, Dreamflux Reef. If it weren't for the need to eliminate you as a variable, I wouldn't have purposely slowed down.

t_ch: 但现在，这边的课程也结束了。
t_en: And with that, the class here has come to an end.

t_ch: 动起来吧，同学。我会在终点等你，为你的人生…揭开新章。
t_en: Get a move on, dear student. I'll be waiting for you at the end, to unveil... a new chapter of your life.

t_ch: 所谓「智识」，是一种常人无法承受的诅咒……
t_en: Erudition is but an affliction that the average person cannot bear...

t_ch: 黑暗在阒寂中覆过万物，即使无法再听见，似乎也猜得到，此时是怎样一句话正在回荡——
t_en: Darkness envelops everything in silence. Even though no sound can be heard, it's easy to imagine what words are echoing at that moment—

t_ch: 「即使失去注视万物的能力，你也不会变得更加不幸。」
t_en: "Even if you lose the ability to see everything, you won't be any less happy."

t_ch: 无论从任何角度来看，男人终究棋差一招，这个他主动迈入的陷阱，偏偏熄灭了他准备用以炸膛的枪火。
t_en: No matter how you look at it, the man is always one step behind. The trap he willingly walked into has extinguished the very firepower he intended to use.

t_ch: 因此，在找到了自己的宿敌之后，他的下场显而易见——和曾经为人的那些存在一样，就此变成猴子的样貌。
t_en: Thus, after finding his nemesis, his fate is clear — just like those who were once human, he too will transform into a monkey.

t_ch: 比如…如果我要求您戒掉麦芽果汁，您首先会想到什么？
t_en: For example... if I asked you to give up malt juice, what would be your first thought?

t_ch: 当然是喝上一杯，对吧？此时此刻，您也是这么想的。
t_en: You'll want to get a drink before that, won't you? That should be the exact thought in your head right now.

t_ch: 接下来，让我们把目光投向一些更复杂的问题。
t_en: Moving on, let's turn our attention toward issues that are a little more complicated...

t_ch: 比如您的「仇恨」，对公司的仇恨。
t_en: Say, your hatred for the IPC.

t_ch: 《银河忍法帖》•前情提要
t_en: Previously on Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions

t_ch: 命运将时间如拉面般拉长，忍之都在御猿•邪忍的摧折下有如奈落地狱，其惨状令大岚神也不禁合眸长叹……
t_en: Destiny elongates time, in the same way ramen noodles are stretched. The Ninja Capital has turned into an abyssal hell under the devastation of Evil Ninja Osaru. Even the mighty Lan would rather close THEIR eyes to the capital's sorry state and let out a long sigh...

t_ch: 而最后的忍者，缭乱•忍者AKA乱破，在苦茶大师门下历经十年苦修，百般忍法无所不通，万字真言倒背如流。
t_en: The only remaining ninja, Dazzling Ninja AKA Rappa, has trained an entire decade under the tutelage of Master Kucha to be adept in a wide variety of ninjutsu, gaining also the ability to recite lengthy mantras fluently.

t_ch: 可苦茶大师明白，唯有令乱破接受其他忍侠的教导，成为践行无上忍道的「缭乱•忍侠」，方能拯救忍之都。
t_en: But deep down Master Kucha is aware that it is only when Rappa receives the tutelage of other Ninja Heroes and embarks upon the paramount way of the ninja as Dazzling Ninja can she save the entire Ninja Capital.

t_ch: 丑时三刻，一颗飞星坠落划破长夜，此乃忍徒•乱破的终点，亦是忍侠•乱破的起点……
t_en: In the darkest hour of the night, a falling meteor streaks across the sky, marking the graduation of Ninja Initiate Rappa and her new identity as Ninja Hero Rappa...

t_ch: 忍之都。
t_en: The Ninja Capital

t_ch: 夜雾下的城郊，街道无色，有色之物乃是遍布街头的霓虹看板、缭乱•忍符的异彩，以及缭乱•忍者的身姿。
t_en: In the suburban night fog, the streets are colorless, save for the neon signs scattered about, the splendid hues of Dazzling Ninja Seals, and the swift silhouette of the Dazzling Ninja herself.

t_ch: 地上如垃圾袋般横竖零落的并非塑料垃圾，而是御猿屋的爪牙。在缭乱•忍者面前投下影子的亦非亡命冤魂，而是一位散发着劲霸忍•力的陌生来客——
t_en: What's scattered on the ground like garbage bags are not plastic garbage. Instead, they are the lackeys of the Osaru. The one casting their shadow in front of the Dazzling Ninja is not a dead spirit, but rather an unknown visitor who exudes a powerful and suppressive power...

t_ch: 初次见面…阁下何许人也？
t_en: Greetings. Who might you be?

t_ch: 初次见面，我等乃是得「巡猎」真传的忍侠，前来讨伐御猿•邪忍。
t_en: My pleasure to make your acquaintance too. We are Ninja Heroes who have received the true teachings of The Hunt. We come forth to punish Evil Ninja Osaru.

t_ch: 忍侠？看来在下的试炼已然告终……
t_en: Ninja Hero? Huh, it seems that my trial has finally come to an end...

t_ch: 试炼？
t_en: Trial?

t_ch: 末法日下的终极•试炼…破除御猿屋的阵法，灭却笼罩此地的灾厄。
t_en: The final trial of the Mappou Age... Destroy the matrix of Osaru's house and end the catastrophe that has befallen this land.

t_ch: 请问…在下是否已经称得上「忍侠」之名？
t_en: Pray tell... Have I proven myself worthy of the title of "Ninja Hero"?

t_ch: 大岚神在上！何等坚毅的忍•魂。诚然，如此纯度的忍者，应当以忍侠相称。
t_en: O mighty Aeon of The Hunt! What indomitable ninja spirit she has! Indeed, one as devoted as you rightfully deserves the title of Ninja Hero.

t_ch: 初次见面，缭乱•忍侠！
t_en: Greetings, Dazzling Ninja!

t_ch: 十年苦行，一朝封名…在下未曾辜负缭乱•忍法，苦茶大师，真希望你能见证此景……
t_en: Ten arduous years of training finally culminated in this, a new title will be conferred upon me today... I can proudly say that I have never gone against the tenets of Dazzling Ninjutsu all this time. How I wish you were here to witness this glory of mine today, Master Kucha...

t_ch: 那么，我要前去讨伐邪忍了，告辞。
t_en: With that, I shall continue my journey to take down the Evil Ninja. Farewell.

t_ch: 且慢，既然在下已是能与邪忍抗衡的忍侠…可否助你一臂之力？
t_en: Make no haste. Since I am now a Ninja Hero fit to contend with the Evil Ninja... Would you let me join you in your crusade?

t_ch: 不，你的狩猎已经完成了，这是属于我等的狩猎——
t_en: No, for your hunt is long complete. This is mine and mine alo—

t_ch: 猎猎猎猎猎猎猎——
t_en: lo—lo—lo—lo—lo—lo—lone...

t_ch: CUT——
t_en: CUT—!

t_ch: 原来如此，这位演员的戏路是「特效电影」。
t_en: I see... This talent would do well in special effect films.

t_ch: 今日的演员可谓有趣。一位生活在绿幕中的演员，一位更替过身份的演员，还有……
t_en: Ah, we have quite some fascinating actors today. One perpetually films before a green screen, another has been through a change of identities, and...

t_ch: 当然还有你，最具潜力的一位，梦想之地的盛会巨星。
t_en: And you, of course. The one with the most potential, Festive Superstar from the Land of the Dreams.

t_ch: 导演，解释一下
t_en: Better explain yourself, director.

t_ch: 给你摄像机扬了嗷
t_en: Your camera's gonna be a victim of my bat~

t_ch: 叛忍，来战！
t_en: Traitorous ninja, engage me in combat!

t_ch: 容我再次道歉，我和蕉授的确有合作关系。但这一切情非得已，身为<color=#dbc291ff>模因生命</color>，我不慎落入敌手，染上了致命的模因病毒。
t_en: Please, let me apologize once more. Yes, it is true that I had a working relationship with Profnana, but I was coerced into it. As a <color=#dbc291ff>memetic lifeform</color>, I inadvertently fell into the hands of my enemies and became infected with a lethal memetic virus.

t_ch: 你是忆者？
t_en: You're a Memokeeper?

t_ch: 你是忆域迷因？
t_en: You're a Memory Zone Meme?

t_ch: 不不，我比那类群众演员要正式得多。
t_en: No, not those. I have a much bigger role than those extras.

t_ch: 你是睡蕉小猴？
t_en: You're a Slumbernana Monkey?

t_ch: 不不，至少现在还不是。
t_en: No... at least not right now.

t_ch: 原来如此，方才的空间•忍法实属精妙，若阁下是来自「流晄忆町」的忆忍，便不足为奇了。
t_en: I see. The spatial ninjutsu that you displayed earlier was truly ingenious. I wouldn't be surprised if you were a Memo Ninja from the Garden of Zencollection.

t_ch: 所以，对于你在校长室的所作所为，我可否理解为背叛只是一场表演，真实目的是为了将我们带来这里？
t_en: So, am I right to see your act of betrayal at the Dean's Office as a ruse to teleport us to safety here?

t_ch: 或者，我更愿意称它为一场自救。
t_en: Perhaps I was just trying to bail myself out of the situation.

t_ch: 自蕉？
t_en: Bana yourself?

t_ch: 蕉？
t_en: Bana?

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉！
t_en: Bana bana!
Bana...
Urk...

t_ch: 诸位的言语……
t_en: The words you speak...

t_ch: 答案正在于此，*蕉声*的影响已经深入你我肺腑。
t_en: Well, this seems to be the answer for everything. Banagibberish has long infiltrated every cell and organ of our body.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼的梦扎根于公众的欲望，模因污染在其中产生不可逆转的影响。睡蕉小猴的风靡并不是开始，恰恰相反，是结束——
t_en: Since Penacony's dreams are rooted in the desires of the masses, the memetic corruption has had an irreversible impact on the Dreamscape itself. Slumbernana Monkey's sweeping craze wasn't the beginning of things. Rather, it heralded the end...

t_ch: 从那一刻起，「睡蕉的时刻」就已注定会诞生。
t_en: From that point onward, the Moment of Slumbernana was fated to be born.

t_ch: 但区别在于，它的持续时间和影响规模，是吗？
t_en: But what differentiates this from other memetic viruses is the period and extent of its influence, is that right?

t_ch: 不错。丹恒演员不但擅长表演，还深谙传播学的道理。
t_en: I'm impressed. It seems Dan Heng is not only a skilled actor, but also has profound knowledge on communication theory.

t_ch: 流行事物潮起潮落，没有不会落幕的风潮。虽然无法压制睡蕉小猴的兴起，但我们仍有可行之事，那就是让风潮的退去提前上映。
t_en: Trends come and go, but every single one of them eventually dies down, much like how a violent storm quells with time. We may not be able to dampen the increasing popularity of Slumbernana Monkey, but we can always work to hasten the trend's recession.

t_ch: 要怎么做？那就该请出今晚最重要的演员了——
t_en: How do we accomplish this, you ask? We'll have to introduce our lead actor for the night!

t_ch: 忍者演员，就是你。
t_en: Yes, it's none other than you, ninja actor.

t_ch: 答案就在在下的「过去」中，是么？
t_en: The key is in my "past," isn't it?

t_ch: 普利蒙蕉授曾这么称呼你——「博士的失败品」。
t_en: Profnana Primon once called you... "the Doctor's failed creation."

t_ch: 对此我深感好奇，是什么促使你坚持使用这种奇妙的忍者世界观进行叙事？
t_en: I am extremely interested in this. What lies behind your insistence on narrating everything from the intriguing worldview of a ninja?

t_ch: 联系到此前的蕉学，我逐渐意识到这或许就是你能免疫睡蕉小猴污染的原因。而蕉授的台词更是点出了一种串联所有的可能——
t_en: When I made the connection between that and the banacademics that we've seen earlier, I came to the realization that this might be the very reason you're immune to Slumbernana Monkey's corruption. What Profnana said also hinted at a possibility that links everything else up.

t_ch: 这是原始博士的另一场实验？乱破演员，你早就是另一种模因病毒的感染者了。
t_en: That this is but another one of Dr. Primitive's experiments. As for you, actor Rappa, you were already infected with another memetic virus.

t_ch: 《银河忍法帖》有云：「蝎毒巧用能解蛇毒，鸩酒有时亦是甘露。」
t_en: As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "When used correctly, the venom of a scorpion neutralizes snake venom, just as poisoned wine may sometimes be used to quench thirst."

t_ch: 阁下所言不错。在下曾落入御猿屋手中，深受邪忍妖术之苦，又历经千生万劫破除邪法，终于逃得生天。
t_en: What you said is right. I once fell into the clutches of Osaru's domain, when sorcery ninjutsu was inflicted upon me. I had to undergo endless tribulations to break the fiendish spells. Only then did I manage to escape.

t_ch: 那段往事已是如浮云般久远的过去。但如今，若毗乃昆尼的明日需要它，便让我等拨开云雾重见天日吧。
t_en: That memory has long become a story I leave behind in my past, though if Pinecany's future hinges on it... I am willing to bring back that memory and face it once more.

t_ch: 有意思，有意思。模因会相互覆盖，病毒也不例外。若能将忍者演员记忆中的病毒「剪辑」出来，便有办法破坏猴子们的联觉梦境。
t_en: Well, well, well. If the memetic entities can overwrite one another, so can memetic viruses. If we can just "edit" this virus out of our ninja actor's memory, there may be a way to destroy those nasty monkeys' Synesthesia Dreamscape.

t_ch: 以影片的第三幕而言，称得上是一种精彩的展开。
t_en: As the third act of a film, this can well be considered as a masterful development to the overall plot.

t_ch: 而为了推动情节发展，{NICKNAME}演员，看来你又要担任关键角色了。
t_en: And for the sake of propelling the plot forward, it looks like you'll have to take on a lead role again, Actor {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我来？
t_en: Me?

t_ch: 难道是说钟表把戏…
t_en: Do you mean Clockwork...?

t_ch: 此刻，球棒•忍者将大放光彩！
t_en: Watch Baseball Bat Ninja shine like a diamond!

t_ch: 无论何种模因病毒，对忆者的影响都可谓致命。但你不同，身为主角，你一定能揭开这影片重重伏笔背后的真相。
t_en: Memetic viruses, no matter the type, can be fatal to a Memokeeper. But that's not the case for you. As the protagonist, you will surely be able to unveil the truth behind the numerous layers of foreshadowing in this film.

t_ch: 请带上我的胶卷，将她的记忆变作破局的{RUBY_B#关键线索}「麦高芬」{RUBY_E#}吧。
t_en: Go on, take my film reel and turn her memories into the {RUBY_B#key clue}"MacGuffin"{RUBY_E#} that will shatter this plot once and for all.

t_ch: （脑袋里的*蕉声*越来越清晰了…动作得快……）
t_en: (The Banagibberish in my mind is getting clearer now... I have to move quickly...)

t_ch: 以那位导演的作风，如果不能剪辑出乱破的记忆，我们恐怕也无法离开这里。务必谨慎行事。
t_en: Given how that director does things, we probably can't leave this place if the memetic virus from Rappa's memories isn't extracted via editing. Let's proceed with caution.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}演员…不，现在你是代理导演了。请前往忍者演员的「片场」拍摄吧。
t_en: Actor {NICKNAME}... No, I should be calling you interim director instead. Please go to the "set" where ninja actor is to begin filming.

t_ch: 如果还有什么要说的——精简镜头数量，巧用剪辑技巧，拍摄对话时不要越轴。
t_en: As for any final advice I can give you — Do not go overboard on the number of shots, be skilled in your editing, and don't cross the axis when filming a dialogue.

t_ch: 你隐约听到门外传来了小猴的*蕉声*，幸福、快乐、轻松的音调让你不禁心生羡意蕉。
t_en: You faintly hear the playful Banagibberish of monkeys outside the door, and the happy, cheerful, carefree tones make you feel a twinge of *banana* envy.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你要去哪蕉？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, where are you going, bana?

t_ch: 对啊，你明明是来这里享受校园的，为什么又遇上了这种麻烦事？这些破事儿到底跟你有什么关系蕉？
t_en: Yeah, you came here to enjoy campus life, so why are you getting caught up in this mess? What do these *banana* troubles have to do with you anyway?

t_ch: 你的旅程总是这样，被迫冒险、被迫努力、被迫解决麻烦，毫无自由可言。难道就不能让你真的选择一次「放弃」吗蕉？
t_en: Your journey always seems like this: forced to take risks, forced to strive, forced to solve problems, with no freedom at all. Can't you ever truly choose to "give the *banana* up"?

t_ch: 喂，你身上的模因病毒比匹诺康尼这个月的烂片还多，再去外面招惹小猴可真要杀青了——
t_en: Hey. You have more memetic viruses on you than the number of trashy Penaconian films released this month. If you wander outside and provoke those monkeys again, you're really going to be done for!

t_ch: 别听他的，做出真正自由的选择，去拥抱自由的猴生吧蕉！
t_en: Don't listen to him. Make a truly free choice and embrace the *banana* freedom of a monkey's life!

t_ch: 走吧蕉！
t_en: Let's go, nana!

t_ch: （旁白+复用战败CG，无配音，待补充）
不对蕉！
t_en: Hold on, bana!

t_ch: 好险！在千钧一发之际，你战胜了心中的*蕉声*。
t_en: Phew! At the last possible moment, you conquered the inner Banagibberish.

t_ch: 球棒•忍者，要来见证在下的往事了吗？在那充斥着血、泪、无情的过往面前，阁下可能会震颤失神，务必做好万全准备。
t_en: Baseball Bat Ninja, are you ready to dive into my past? Make all necessary preparations, for you may be jolted out of sorts when we encounter the bloody, tearful, and ruthless moments in my memory.

t_ch: 钟表•忍法，开！
t_en: Clockwork ninjutsu, activate!

t_ch: 先等一下。
t_en: Hold on a second.

t_ch: 忍者伺机而动，等待亦是正解。
t_en: Ninjas only strike when the opportunity presents itself. Waiting might be the right course of action to take for now.

t_ch: 试问：何为忍侠，何以成为忍侠？
t_en: Pray tell, what does it mean to be a Ninja Hero? And how does one become a Ninja Hero?

t_ch: 天资？血脉？传承？忍•魂凭依？
t_en: Through talent? Lineage? Inheritance? Or being possessed by the ninja spirit?

t_ch: <size=36>皆非！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Nay, none of these!</size>

t_ch: 浩瀚如海的银河•忍界，忍者多如飞鱼籽，而忍侠贵如金河豚。
t_en: Across the wide expanse of the Cosmic Ninja Realm, those who practice ninjutsu are as prevalent as flying fish roe, yet Ninja Heroes are as rare as precious golden pufferfish.

t_ch: 此刻，忍侠的传说画卷将要展开。在缭乱•忍侠的前尘•影事录前，竭尽全力保持理智吧——
t_en: At this juncture, the legendary scroll of the Ninja Hero is on the cusp of being unfurled. Do your best to maintain your sanity as you watch Dazzling Ninja's past unfold before you...

t_ch: <size=36>银河忍法帖•前尘•影事录</size>
t_en: <size=36>Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: Past Reverie</size>

t_ch: 上•三番苦行得正尽觉之卷
t_en: Part One: Epiphany via Tribulation

t_ch: 申请开舱——权限不足，请输入密码。
t_en: Hatch-unlock requested... Insufficient clearance. Please enter password.

t_ch: 秘咒？难不倒我。
t_en: An enchantment? It won't stop me!

t_ch: （这是…乱破的声音，是过去的她？）
t_en: (This is... Rappa's voice. Is this a past version of her?)

t_ch: 临、兵、斗、者…破。
t_en: Rin, Pyou, Tou, Sha... Break!

t_ch: 密码正确，活体基因编辑已关闭，舱门开启中。
t_en: Password input correct. Live specimen gene editing disabled. Opening hatch.

t_ch: 御猿屋的封印…不过如此。
t_en: That's all there is to Osaru's seal...? Hah.

t_ch: 纵使感官被邪术蒙蔽，在下也能看见此地正在上演的罪恶…可恨、可叹。
t_en: Even while my senses are dulled by sorcery, I can still see the grotesque sins that are unfolding here... How detestable and deplorable indeed.

t_ch: （我变成了乱破记忆中的自己…这里就是忍之都？和想象中完全不同……）
t_en: (I am now the self that Rappa remembers in her memories... So this is the Ninja Capital? It's completely different from what I imagined...)

t_ch: 这样试炼就结束了…回去谒见大师，继续修行吧。
t_en: That should be the end of my trial... Time to return to Master and resume my training.

t_ch: 恐怖，实属恐怖。凡人如标本般被陈列于透明水牢，遭受邪术折磨——这无疑是末法•之世的一个侧面。
t_en: Terrifying, absolutely terrifying. Mortals are displayed in transparent aquatic prisons like they're nothing but specimens as sorcery inflicts torture on them... This is undoubtedly a scene from the Mappou Age of the Dharma.

t_ch: 此帖记叙着御猿•邪忍的邪术与罪证，多么无血无泪的恶行，想必在阅读后没有人不会为之战抖！
t_en: This scroll describes the sorcery and crimes attributed to Evil Ninja Osaru. Such ruthless and immoral sins... All who read it will undoubtedly tremble before this monstrosity!

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉——返祖目标：狭鼻次目；基因退行进度：7％；生命体征：稳定。
t_en: Bana, bana. Atavistic target: Old World monkey. Gene regression progress: 7%. Vital signs: Stable.

t_ch: 此乃御猿•邪忍的忍•斥候，它正在监视着樊笼中的受难者…大岚神啊，恶徒的眼目觊觎人间，你怎能继续合眸安眠？
t_en: This is Evil Ninja Osaru's ninja scout. It is currently monitoring the victims imprisoned in their cages... O mighty Aeon of The Hunt, evildoers have cast their covetous eyes upon the world. How can you continue to slumber with your eyes closed?

t_ch: 拜见苦茶大师。秘咒…已被在下破解。
t_en: Salutations, Master Kucha. I have... deciphered the enchantment.

t_ch: 什、什么…这才不到两个系统时……
t_en: Wh—What...? It's not even two system hours...

t_ch: 苦茶大师，我现在…算得上「忍徒」了吗？
t_en: Master Kucha, do I... count as a "ninja initiate" now?

t_ch: …咳咳，当然！
t_en: ...Ahem. Why, yes!

t_ch: 初入忍道的女孩，老夫认可你的决心。今日起，你便是缭乱•忍法的传人了。
t_en: O child new to the way of the ninja, I recognize your determination. Henceforth, you shall be the successor to my Dazzling Ninjutsu.

t_ch: 谢谢大师。弟子…不胜荣幸。
t_en: Thank you, Master. This is... my greatest honor.

t_ch: 看这阴翳中的城邦！苦难、仇恨、悲伤，都在浸满罪恶的土地中滋长，血泪汇聚的浪将吞没一切希望。
t_en: Behold the city of shadow! A sinful land of suffering, hatred, and sorrow. Bloody tears soon to devour all hope for the morrow.

t_ch: 皆因无情无泪的御猿•邪忍，施展邪术令百姓沉沦，纵容邪祟倚势凌人，引得天下共愤。
t_en: Soulless Evil Ninja Osaru, agent of the vile, cast the masses into sin by foul arts and guile. Fiendlings indulgent in evil gone wild, enraged the hearts of all — man, woman, and child.

t_ch: 你将接过忍侠的遗业，清算邪忍的罪孽，终结忍之都的长夜，还百姓一个清平世界。
t_en: Inherit the legacy of the Ninja Hero and wipe clean the sins of Osaru. End the suffering wrought upon the Ninja Capital and bring peace back to its people.

t_ch: 我会努力修行，有朝一日…成为大师所说的「缭乱忍侠」。
t_en: I will continue to train hard... till the day I become the Dazzling Ninja that Master speaks of.

t_ch: 多么令人敬佩的觉悟！为与邪忍抗衡，你还需要一个新的名字，属于忍者的名字。
t_en: An admirable resolution! To contend with the Evil Ninja, you will also need a new name — a name befitting a ninja.

t_ch: 名字…？「AK-A-3」是名字吗？
t_en: Name...? Is AK-A-3 a name?

t_ch: 我不知道，忍徒。名字会承载你的理想，铭刻信念，昭示命运。它是属于你自己的忍号。
t_en: I don't know, my disciple. Your name will carry your ideals, your convictions, and your destiny. Your ninja name belongs to you alone.

t_ch: ——所以，你要自己决定。
t_en: So, the decision is yours to make.

t_ch: 那…「乱破」。一心不乱、破邪显正，这是大师最初的教导，我想以此为名。
t_en: In that case... I choose Rappa. To have a dedicated heart that will never be disturbed, and to pacify all evil and demonstrate justice... that was Master's initial teachings to me. I wish to use them in my name.

t_ch: 好！初次见面，缭乱•忍徒AKA乱破！接下来就是成为忍者的苦修了，跟得上吗？
t_en: As you wish! Nice to meet you, Dazzling Initiate AKA Rappa! You will now embark on an arduous training to become a ninja. Can you keep up?

t_ch: 当然。痛楚是忍者的平常，在下绝不会退却。
t_en: Certainly. Pain is but common to a ninja and I shall never flinch in the face of it.

t_ch: 是邪祟…但这是同样憎恶御猿•邪忍，归于苦茶大师门外的缭乱•邪祟。
t_en: A fiendling... No, it is a Dazzling Fiendling under Master Kucha, though not directly. This fiendling harbors just as much hatred for Evil Ninja Osaru.

t_ch: 三号…服药……
t_en: No. 3... take medicine...

t_ch: 晦暗的密药，蕴含过量忍•力，咽下则将承受碎骨断肠之苦。
t_en: Secret concoctions of concealed evil. It contains an excessive amount of ninja strength. Swallowing it means enduring bone-shattering pain.

t_ch: 但要成为忍侠，必须每日服用…以此在体内开创忍•力•大宇宙，乃是磨炼身心之行。
t_en: However, to become a Ninja Hero, I must consume these pills every day... Only then can I create a never-ending source of Cosmic Ninja Strength within my body. Yes, this is a trial to temper my mind and body.

t_ch: 服用忍•药
t_en: Swallow the Ninja Pill.

t_ch: 服下它吧，为了忍之都——
t_en: Swallow it, for the sake of the Ninja Capital...

t_ch: 拒绝服用
t_en: Refuse to swallow it.

t_ch: 莫要畏惧…忍侠不可畏惧！
t_en: Steel your nerves... A Ninja Hero never fears!

t_ch: 在服下药物的瞬间，剧烈的疼痛淹没了你的感知。
t_en: The moment you take the medicine, intense pain overwhelms your senses.

t_ch: （唔，这种剧痛是乱破当时的感受吗……）
t_en: (Urk, is this excruciating pain what Rappa endured back then...?)

t_ch: 押忍！经此苦行三千夜，在下当如忍侠一般…刀枪不入。
t_en: Hi-yah! Having persevered through unending nights of tribulations, I will boast... the impenetrable body of a Ninja Hero.

t_ch: 皮肤、肌肉、骨骼…你感觉自己身上的每个部位都被侵蚀、破坏、重组……
t_en: Your skin, muscles, bones... You feel every part of your body being eroded, destroyed, and reconstructed...

t_ch: 她是叆叇馆主，道馆的首脑，亦是我等缭乱众的后援。
t_en: This is Umbra Headmistress, the head of the dojo and a reliable supportive figure for us Dazzling students.

t_ch: 她用鸣神大环唤醒忍者的潜能，经由雷遁忍法醍醐灌顶，身体便可拥有超凡的忍•感官。
t_en: She uses the Great Narukami Circle to awaken the latent potential of ninjas. After attaining enlightenment via reverse lightning ninjutsu, one's body can then possess extraordinary ninja senses.

t_ch: 三号，我要提升强度了。你可要撑住啊，实验室的未来就靠你了。
t_en: No. 3, I am about to increase the intensity. You better be able to handle it. The future of this laboratory is all in your hands.

t_ch: 正是如此…忍之都的未来当由缭乱•忍侠开创。在下定会履行承诺。
t_en: Yes, that is the plan... The future of the Ninja Capital shall be shaped by the Dazzling Ninja Hero. I will definitely fulfill my promise.

t_ch: 接受鸣神大环
t_en: Accept the Great Narukami Circle.

t_ch: 戴上它吧，为了成为忍侠——
t_en: Put it on, for the sake of becoming a Ninja Hero...

t_ch: 逃离此处
t_en: Flee.

t_ch: 莫要逃避…忍侠不可逃避！
t_en: Rid all thoughts of escape... Ninja Heroes never flee!

t_ch: 脖上的颈圈散发出强劲的电流，如同千根尖针穿过你的血肉，无数炸弹在身体中引爆。你的心脏开始以反常的速率颤动，耳边传来了无数声响，甚至包括质子入灭的声响。
t_en: The collar emits powerful electrical currents, like thousands of needles piercing through your flesh and blood, and countless bombs exploding within your body. Your heart begins to beat at an unusual rate. You hear countless noises, including the deaths of protons.

t_ch: （这也…太过分了吧……）
t_en: (This is... too much...!)

t_ch: 押忍！经此苦行三千夜，在下将如忍侠一般…神通广大。
t_en: Osu! Having persevered through unending nights of tribulations, I now boast... the vast senses of a Ninja Hero.

t_ch: 这群邪祟是御猿屋的叛•猿众，它们每日都会与在下切磋忍法，磨砺在下的忍•空手道。
t_en: These fiendlings are Rebel Apes of Osaru's clan. They would spar with me every day, improving my ninja skills and refining my ninja martial prowess.

t_ch: 三号，应激能力培养-Ⅳ级，对抗下级战斗猿……
t_en: No. 3. Stress Response Training Tier IV. Fighting low-level combat apes...

t_ch: 我从未战胜过这些邪祟，因为在下还是一介忍徒。
t_en: I have never won against these fiendlings, for I am still but a mere ninja initiate.

t_ch: 但在下要成为缭乱•忍侠，若不能降伏几只邪祟，何谈打败御猿•邪忍？战！战至清晨的乌鸦开始嘶鸣为止。
t_en: Yet, if I am to become the Dazzling Ninja, I must vanquish these fiendlings! Only then can I be worthy of defeating Evil Ninja Osaru... To battle! Do not stop until the crows start cawing at the crack of dawn.

t_ch: 进行切磋
t_en: Spar with them.

t_ch: 开始狩猎吧，为了打败邪忍——
t_en: Let the hunt begin, for the sake of defeating evil one day...

t_ch: 拒绝战斗
t_en: Refuse to fight.

t_ch: 莫要退却…忍侠不可退却！
t_en: Turn back around... Ninja Heroes never retreat!

t_ch: 邪祟们逼向了你，虽然是演武，但也要拿出真•狩猎的态度来应对！
t_en: The fiendlings have approached you. Even though it's just practice, you have to take on them with a true hunting attitude!

t_ch: 三号，Ⅳ级实验通过…评级提高……
t_en: No. 3. Cleared experiment Tier IV... Rating increased...

t_ch: 《银河忍法帖》有云…「忍道长漫漫，苦难当滑板」……
t_en: As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "The way of the ninja is long and windy, and trials and tribulations are mere amusements..."

t_ch: 押忍！经此苦行三千夜，在下将如忍侠一般…无可匹敌。
t_en: Osu! Having persevered through unending nights of tribulations, I now boast... the unrivaled stature of a Ninja Hero.

t_ch: 是苦茶大师…与叆叇馆主？
t_en: Master Kucha... and Umbra Headmistress?

t_ch: 对三号使用模因病毒…这对实验有什么帮助吗？
t_en: Use a memetic virus on No. 3... How would that help the experiment?

t_ch: 听得很清楚…在下的超•听力已然能捕捉忍者的低语了吗？甚是可喜。
t_en: I can clearly hear everything they're saying... Is my superhearing capable of picking up even whispers among ninjas now? A joyous discovery indeed.

t_ch: 能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>，我们需要提升三号的精神抗性。
t_en: Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>, we need to increase No. 3's mental resilience.

t_ch: 别弯弯绕绕的了，你就是见不得她受苦吧？
t_en: Enough with these lame excuses. You just can't bear to see her suffer, can you?

t_ch: 后面的实验她不一定撑得住，如果用模因病毒进行认知干预，保持她的精神稳定，实验也能更顺利。
t_en: She might not be able to withstand the later experiments. If we use the memetic virus to perform cognitive intervention and ensure that her mind remains stable, the experiments can proceed more smoothly.

t_ch: 行吧，但千万别带上个人感情。你让三号到处乱跑，研究猿已经有意见了。
t_en: Fine, but make sure not to bring your personal feelings into this. The Research Apes aren't exactly happy about how you are allowing No. 3 to run around at will.

t_ch: 她用两个系统时就能解开改造仓的密码，也没法像猩猩一样关在笼子里啊……
t_en: She's able to decipher the password to the modification cabin in just two system hours. There's no way we'll be able to cage her up like any old gorilla...

t_ch: 大师不必苦恼。区区皮肉之苦，无法摧垮在下的忍•魂。
t_en: Do not be troubled over me, Master. Mere physical suffering can never devastate my ninja spirit.

t_ch: 信息稀释度<unbreak>74</unbreak>％，意识锚点锁定，模因刻录即将开始。
t_en: Information dilution at <unbreak>74%</unbreak>. Consciousness anchor locked on. Memetic etching is about to begin.

t_ch: 乱破忍徒，准备好了吗？邪忍对你施展的幻惑邪术就要被祛除了！
t_en: Ninja Initiate Rappa, are you ready? The illusory sorcery that the Evil Ninja cast upon you is about to be broken!

t_ch: 模因刻录要开始了。赶紧离开吧，不然我们也会受到影响。
t_en: Memetic etching is about to begin. Let's get out of here! Or we'll get affected as well.

t_ch: 在下…在下看见了！忍界竟有如此宏伟的都城！
t_en: I... I see it now! To think, there's such a majestic capital in the Ninja World!

t_ch: 太好了，看来成功了……
t_en: Awesome! Looks like it was a success...

t_ch: 话说回来，为什么是忍者？
t_en: Since we're on this, why ninjas?

t_ch: 是《银河忍法帖》。
t_en: Oh, because of the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions.

t_ch: 什么东西？
t_en: The what now?

t_ch: 「为了保护无助的弱者，拯救沉沦的忍之都。正义的忍侠狩猎着世间邪忍！」
t_en: "In order to protect the helpless weak and save the fallen Ninja Capital, the righteous Ninja Hero hunts down the world's Evil Ninjas!"

t_ch: ——是一部漫画。自从为了躲避巡海游侠，我们将研究所封闭后，我收集的漫画书是她唯一能获取到的娱乐了。
t_en: ...It's a manga series. After we sealed off the research institute to hide from the Galaxy Rangers, my manga collection has been her only source of entertainment.

t_ch: 怪不得三号总是疯疯癫癫的……
t_en: Now I know why No. 3 always looks so loopy...

t_ch: 劝你小心点，别给她灌输没用的知识。「智识」的坐标系只有一条横轴，除此以外都是进步的阻碍。
t_en: You'd better be careful not to go overboard with giving her such useless information. There's only one horizontal axis on Erudition's coordinate system. Everything else is an impediment to progress.

t_ch: 尤其是庸俗的善恶观，你还嫌巡海游侠带来的麻烦不够多吗？
t_en: That's especially true for the banal concepts of good and evil... Haven't the Galaxy Rangers given us enough trouble already?

t_ch: 思想这么狭隘，这辈子都别想引起博士的关注。
t_en: You'll never get the Doctor to notice you if you keep being so narrow-minded.

t_ch: 是吗？博士…真的会在意我们这些凡人吗？
t_en: Is that so? Would Doctor... really notice ordinary mortals like us?

t_ch: 下•迷乱忍彩破邪魔阵之卷
t_en: Part Two: Vanquisher in Dazzle

t_ch: 要把三号移交给能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>？为什么！？
t_en: You're transferring No. 3 to Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>? Why!?

t_ch: 答案很简单，你毕不了业了。根据能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>的报告，你正在让实验走向错误的方向。
t_en: Simple. You won't be able to graduate. According to Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>'s reports, you have been guiding the experiment in the wrong direction.

t_ch: 不，先让我去找她问个清楚！
t_en: No! Let me ask her what she means by this!

t_ch: 很荣幸能作为第十七实验室的代表，向在座各位阐述我们的理念——
t_en: It's an honor for me to represent Laboratory <unbreak>17</unbreak> and elaborate on our beliefs to all who are present today...

t_ch: 正如各位智者看见的那样，如今的宇宙就像一箱被遗弃的香蕉。
t_en: Wise attendees, as you can clearly see, our universe today is nothing but a crate of abandoned bananas.

t_ch: 为了拯救正在迈向腐烂的诸界，人类必须后退！后退！再后退！将无穷尽的可能性重新赋予文明，令「智识」再度绽放七彩的光芒！
t_en: In order to save the worlds marching towards rot and decay, humanity must regress! Regress! And regress further! Only then will civilization be imbued with endless possibilities yet again, allowing Erudition to shine with kaleidoscopic rays once more!

t_ch: 不必对世人的苛责有所忌惮，一份伟业总要以凡人的梦想作为薪柴，但成为薪柴是幸福的，朽木只有在燃烧时才具有最高的价值。
t_en: Do not be concerned by the accusations and criticisms of others, for a grand cause must always use the dreams of the common masses as kindling. Yet, it is blissful for them to become kindling, for rotten wood only contributes the greatest value when it is set ablaze.

t_ch: 人尽其才，物尽其用！诸位，我们要让实验中的每一只「猴子」都理解这份幸福，和他们一起在幸福中燃烧吧！
t_en: People should make use of their talents to the fullest, just as items should be utilized fully! We must ensure that every "monkey" in the experiment fully comprehends this bliss. Let us burn alongside them in happiness!

t_ch: 燃烧！燃烧！燃烧！
t_en: Burn! Burn! Burn!

t_ch: 能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>，这到底是怎么回事？！
t_en: Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>! What is all this!?

t_ch: 我已经毕业了，你现在得叫我「猿<unbreak>22</unbreak>」。
t_en: I've graduated. Now you need to call me Ape <unbreak>22</unbreak>.

t_ch: 还问为什么？那可是耗尽研究所心血，用<color=#dbc291ff>返祖实验筛选出的基因</color>培育而成的新人类，可你却把她变成了一个疯子。研究猿已经决定了，以后培育由我来主导。
t_en: As for what this is? That specimen is the new human that our laboratory painstakingly bred with <color=#dbc291ff>genes filtered from the atavistic experiments</color>, but you made her a lunatic. The Research Apes have decided that I will take over her nurturing from here on out.

t_ch: 我不管主导权在谁手里，但你不能再继续实验了，她会废掉的。
t_en: Who's in charge isn't important, but you can't continue the experiment anymore. She'll break.

t_ch: 没事，我已经在培育四号了，如果出问题了就顶上新的。
t_en: That's fine. I'm already nurturing No. 4. If something happens to 3, we'll replace her with that new one.

t_ch: *大师密咒*，那是我们从小养大的孩子，你就没有一丁点道德吗？！
t_en: How could you!? We brought her up since she was a baby! Do you not have a shred of morality!?

t_ch: 道德？你跟我讲道德？
t_en: Morality? Are you really talking to me about morality?

t_ch: 在巴克斯-Ⅱ，道德是每家的次子要被当作纳努克的祭品；在天马星际公国，道德是双足生物必须成为四足生物的奴隶；在卡帕卡拉星，道德是蓝色眼睛的人不许踏上街道。
t_en: On Bacchus-II, morality is how every family's second son must be sacrificed to Nanook. On the Interstellar Principality of Pegasus, morality is how bipedal organisms must be enslaved by quadrupedal ones. On the Kapakala planet, morality is how blue-eyed individuals are forbidden from walking on the streets.

t_ch: 道德束缚住了那些人的智慧，终结了那些世界的未来，所以原始博士才会将它们选为返祖实验的目标。
t_en: Morality has bound the wisdom of those people and ended the future of those worlds. That was why Dr. Primitive chose them as targets of the atavistic experiment.

t_ch: 我们的牺牲不是为了这种庸俗的东西，而是为了能让人类幸福、让宇宙进步、让博士满意的未来啊！
t_en: The sacrifices we made are not for such vulgar things. Rather, they're meant to create a future where humans can be happy, where the universe can continue to advance, and one that the Doctor can be proud of!

t_ch: 叆叇馆主，阁下是在…摧毁《银河忍法帖》？为何？
t_en: Umbra Headmistress, you're... destroying the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions? Why?

t_ch: 隔离认知是治愈模因病毒的第一步。你本该等同天才的智慧就是被这些垃圾扼杀的。
t_en: Cognition isolation is the first step to curing one of a memetic virus. You were supposed to have the intelligence of a genius, but such garbage ruined it.

t_ch: ——把它撕了，自己撕掉。
t_en: ...Rip them. Tear them to shreds yourself.

t_ch: 这、这是缭乱•忍侠的秘宝，万万不能……
t_en: This... This is the dearest treasure of the Dazzling Ninja school. We cannot do that...

t_ch: 奇怪，我记得你一直很听话。能人<unbreak>75</unbreak>说什么你就做什么，怎么到我这儿就不是了？
t_en: Odd. I've always thought of you as obedient. You always did everything Denisovan <unbreak>75</unbreak> said. Why aren't you obeying me?
—Bam!

t_ch: 嘶…这肌肉组织还真是坚硬，像扇在石头上一样。
t_en: Agh... Your muscle fibers sure are densely packed. It's like slapping a rock.

t_ch: 空手道…空手道为何？
t_en: The palm... Why... used on me...?

t_ch: 快点，撕掉这些垃圾！
t_en: Hurry and tear up this trash!

t_ch: 只要你好好表现，我和能人<unbreak>75</unbreak>都能沾上光。你也不想让他失望，对吧？
t_en: As long as you perform well, both Denisovan <unbreak>75</unbreak> and I will be praised. You don't wish to disappoint him, do you?

t_ch: 苦茶大师……
t_en: Master Kucha...

t_ch: 在下懂了，这一定是苦茶大师的试炼，想考验我的忍•断舍离之心……
t_en: I understand. This must be Master Kucha's trial for me. He's testing my ninja skills of letting go...

t_ch: 叆叇馆主与苦茶大师？他们在谈论何事……
t_en: Umbra Headmistress and Master Kucha? What are they talking about...?

t_ch: 能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>，你不能把她处理掉！
t_en: Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>! You cannot get rid of her!

t_ch: 三号也是失败品。她擅闯收容室，大肆制造混乱，还对研究猿出言不逊。仅凭这一点，她就已经不及格了。
t_en: No. 3 is also a failed experimental subject. She barged into the storage room without permission, created a huge mess, and was rude to the Research Apes. Just that alone is enough to make her a failure.

t_ch: 可你知道，那只是一场意外。
t_en: But you know that was just an accident.

t_ch: 我是研究猿，不是蕉师。是你把她养成了这种该死的样子，实验室就应该向你追责。
t_en: I'm a Research Ape, not a BananAdvisor. You're the one who made her into this damned state she is in. The laboratory should hold you accountable for the way she turned out.

t_ch: 混账……
t_en: Damn it...

t_ch: 苦茶大师，在下…做错了吗？
t_en: Master Kucha, have I... done something wrong?

t_ch: …不，乱破。
t_en: ...No, Rappa.

t_ch: 你做得非常好，真正的忍侠，就该一心贯彻自己的忍道。
t_en: You have done extremely well. A true Ninja Hero must wholeheartedly devote oneself to the way of the ninja.

t_ch: 你挫败了邪忍的阴谋，救下了很多无辜之人，毫无疑问，你已经有真正的忍者之姿了。
t_en: You foiled the Evil Ninja's schemes and saved so many innocent people... You undoubtedly already have the bearing of a true ninja.

t_ch: 在下已是真正的忍者了吗？
t_en: Am I really a true ninja now?

t_ch: 当然——忍徒•乱破。
t_en: Of course... Now, Ninja Initiate Rappa.

t_ch: 弟子在。
t_en: Yes, Master.

t_ch: 你拜入师门已有五年，不惧苦修的熬煎，不畏试炼的艰险，百般忍法皆已精娴。
t_en: You've trained under me for five years. After rigorous tests and trials, you've mastered hundreds of ninja techniques.

t_ch: 今日我赐你「缭乱•忍者」之名，你将成为我等讨伐邪忍的尖兵，引领忍之都砥砺前行。
t_en: I hereby bestow upon you the title of Dazzling Ninja, entrusting you to be my weapon to defeat the evil ninja and guide the Ninja Capital into the future.

t_ch: 拜谢苦茶大师，弟子不胜荣幸……
t_en: Thank you, Master Kucha. This is my greatest honor...!

t_ch: 把这卷轴拿去吧。此乃缭乱•忍法的奥义所在，它能释放邪祟畏惧的异彩，将邪忍的阵法尽数破坏。
t_en: Take the scroll with you, for within its pages lie the secrets of Dazzling Ninjutsu. It shall cast a brilliance that makes fiendlings fear and destroy the evil ninja's intricate matrices.

t_ch: 将它泼洒在「忍之都」吧，用墨彩将这城的阴霾驱散，扬起反抗罪恶的旗幡。
t_en: Paint it throughout the Ninja Capital. Banish the shadows with ink, and raise the banner against evil.

t_ch: 弟子应该画些什么？
t_en: What should I paint?

t_ch: 我不知道，忍徒。
t_en: I do not know, my disciple.

t_ch: 你可以画任何东西，诠释你心中所想的画卷。这是属于你自己的忍法。
t_en: You may paint anything that you wish. This is your own ninjutsu.

t_ch: ——所以，你要自己决定。
t_en: So, the decision is yours to make.
...Yes.

t_ch: 此地就是阵眼所在。依大师所言，缭乱•忍法能遮蔽邪忍的阵法。
t_en: This is where the matrix core is. According to Master, Dazzling Ninjutsu can overwrite the Evil Ninja's matrix.

t_ch: 将密咒灌注于异彩中，覆盖阵眼上的密咒，多么奇妙的忍•科学。
t_en: Channel the mantra into the colorful brilliance, then paint it over the existing mantra on the matrix core... What wondrous ninja tech.

t_ch: 缭乱•忍符，开！
t_en: Dazzling Ninja Seal, open!

t_ch: 能人<unbreak>75</unbreak>，这是怎么回事？研究所里全他蕉的是电子涂鸦，把安全系统都搞崩溃了！
t_en: Denisovan <unbreak>75</unbreak>, what is going on!? There's digital graffiti all over the laboratory. It even crashed the security system!

t_ch: 我不知道啊，肯定是黑客入侵——我马上就去处理。
t_en: I have no idea... Someone must've hacked in. I'll check on it right away.

t_ch: 快点！再不修好，游侠就要找上门了！
t_en: Well be quick about it! If we don't fix it soon, the Rangers are gonna find us!

t_ch: 苦茶大师，在下已将缭乱•忍符布置在忍之都各处。
t_en: Master Kucha, I have placed the Dazzling Ninja Seal all over the Ninja Capital.

t_ch: 干得漂亮，缭乱•忍者。这样邪忍的阵法就无法限制我等的通讯•忍术了。
t_en: Good work, Dazzling Ninja. This way, the Evil Ninja's matrix will no longer be able to stop our communication ninjutsu.

t_ch: 快点来吧，游侠们，让这场荒唐的闹剧早点结束——
t_en: Make haste, Rangers. Bring this ridiculous farce to an end...

t_ch: ——住手！
t_en: ...Stop!

t_ch: 能人<unbreak>75</unbreak>，你在做什么！？
t_en: What are you doing, Denisovan <unbreak>75</unbreak>!?

t_ch: 能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>……
t_en: Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>...

t_ch: 居然、居然欺骗实验品，欺骗学术伙伴，欺骗研究猿——第十七实验室最大的过错，就是让你这种学术骗子混了进来！
t_en: H—How dare you deceive the experimental subject, your fellow research partners, and the Research Apes!? The biggest mistake Laboratory <unbreak>17</unbreak> ever made was to allow a research fraud such as you to infiltrate this place!

t_ch: 叆叇馆主…在说什么？
t_en: What is... Umbra Headmistress talking about?

t_ch: 乱破，她是邪忍的部下。
t_en: Rappa, she is a follower of the Evil Ninja.

t_ch: 什么？叆叇馆主…竟是叛忍？
t_en: What? Umbra Headmistress... is a traitorous ninja?

t_ch: 够了——战斗猿们，清理门户！
t_en: Enough! Combat Apes, take care of them!

t_ch: 怎么可能，这批战斗猿可是研究猿亲自培养的……
t_en: How could this happen? These Combat Apes were personally trained by the Research Apes...

t_ch: 不枉在下日夜苦行，这便是缭乱•空手道。
t_en: My long hours of training have finally paid off. This is Dazzling Palm.

t_ch: 你看，这就是它们口中的「失败品」。
t_en: Look. This is what they call the "failed subject."

t_ch: 这场实验是我们一起进行的，我们亲手把她变成了现在的模样——卓绝的智慧、超凡的感知、强大的力量……
t_en: We conducted this experiment together. We were the ones who shaped her into this: Someone with unparalleled intelligence, extraordinary perception, and incredible power...

t_ch: 告诉我，她到底失败在哪里？
t_en: Tell me. In what sense of the word is she considered a failure?

t_ch: 你、你怎么能质疑博士的理论，研究猿们肯定有自己的考量！
t_en: Y—You... how dare you question the Doctor's theory? The Research Apes must have their own considerations!

t_ch: 安全系统马上就要恢复了，等着承受原始博士的怒火吧，没有自知之明的薪柴！
t_en: The security system will be repaired soon. Prepare to feel the full force of Dr. Primitive's wrath, you oblivious kindling!

t_ch: 你错了。
t_en: You're wrong.

t_ch: 原始博士…才不会在意我们这些凡人。
t_en: Dr. Primitive... wouldn't care about ordinary people like us.

t_ch: 乱破，试炼已经结束了，你走吧。
t_en: Rappa, this trial is over. You should go.

t_ch: 可是，苦茶大师……
t_en: But, Master Kucha...

t_ch: 乱破，离开。
t_en: Leave, Rappa.
...Yes.

t_ch: 你、你居然还私藏武器，你想干什么——
t_en: Y—You are secretly concealing weapons as well? What are you planning—

t_ch: 能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>，多亏了你，我想明白了，道德确实是虚伪而肤浅的事物……
t_en: Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>... thanks to you, I finally understood that morality is indeed a hypocritical and superficial concept...

t_ch: 所以，我决定抛下它了。
t_en: That's why I've decided to ditch it for good.

t_ch: 朋友！把枪放下，我们这么多年同窗，你不可以——
t_en: W—Wait, my friend! Please... Please, put the gun down. We've been classmates for so many years now. You can't—

t_ch: 「叆叇馆主」，吟诵辞世句吧。
t_en: "Umbra Headmistress," it's time you breathed your last.

t_ch: 此乃因果•报应。
t_en: This... is karma.

t_ch: 忍之都外的空气，原来是这种味道。
t_en: So....... this.... is how the air outside the Ninja Capital..... actually... smells like.

t_ch: ——喂，小姑娘，你还好吗？
t_en: Hey, little miss, are you alright?

t_ch: 初次见面。阁下…何许人也？
t_en: Pleasure to meet you. Who... might you be?

t_ch: 巡海游侠，我收到了求救信号。*忍侠俚语*，到底是原始博士党羽的地盘，跟*忍侠俚语*藏在树林里的香蕉一样难找。
t_en: Galaxy Ranger. I received a distress signal. This place really is the territory of Dr. Primitive's henchmen. It's as hard to find as those *Ninja Slang* bananas hidden in the woods.

t_ch: 忍侠？看来在下的试炼已然终了。
t_en: Ninja Hero? Huh. It seems my trial has finally come to an end.

t_ch: 试炼？说什么*忍侠俚语*…又是个被猴子逼疯的可怜娃，*忍侠俚语*。
t_en: Trial? What kind of *Ninja Slang*... Another poor kid driven mad by those monkeys, *Ninja Slang*.

t_ch: 末法日下的终极•试炼…破除御猿屋的阵法，灭却笼罩此地的灾厄……
t_en: The final trial of the Mappou Age... Destroy the matrix of Osaru's house and end the catastrophe.

t_ch: 请问…在下是否已经称得上「忍侠」之名？
t_en: Pray tell... Have I proven myself worthy of the title of "Ninja Hero"?

t_ch: *忍侠俚语*不会吧…我说怎么实验室这帮*忍侠俚语*全死地上了。
t_en: *Ninja Slang*, no way... So that's why all those *Ninja Slang* in the lab are lying dead on the ground.

t_ch: 全是你一人干的？
t_en: Was it all your doing?

t_ch: 十年苦行，一朝封名……
t_en: Ten years of suffering, one day of recognition...

t_ch: 在下没有辜负缭乱•忍法…苦茶大师，真希望你能见证此景……
t_en: I have not let down Dazzling Ninjutsu... Master Kucha, I really wish you could witness this...

t_ch: *忍侠俚语*我可算懂了，这姑娘中了模因病毒。乖乖，换普通人早*忍侠俚语*成*忍侠俚语*了，她还能活蹦乱跳？
t_en: *Ninja Slang*, I get it now. This girl's infected with a memetic virus. *Ninja Slang*, most people would've turned into complete *Ninja Slang* by now, but she's still running around like nothing's wrong?

t_ch: 妹子，听我说！你现在很危险，再不接受治疗，脑子早晚得炸掉！
t_en: Please, listen to me! You're in serious danger right now. If you don't get treated soon, your brain will eventually burst!

t_ch: 且慢！既然在下已是能与邪忍抗衡的忍侠……
t_en: Wait! Since I am now a ninja hero who can contend with evil ninjas...

t_ch: 可否，助你一臂之力…？
t_en: Might I... lend you a hand?

t_ch: *忍侠俚语*，现在还说这个，不要命了？
t_en: *Ninja Slang*, you're asking me this now. Do you have a death wish?

t_ch: 人死了就没法复仇了。想踏上「巡猎」？妹子，这可是条不归路啊！
t_en: You want to go on The Hunt? Know that this is a road of no return!

t_ch: 大岚神在上。祓除万恶，不死不休，纵使箭在弦上，永不复还……
t_en: Great Lan above. Eradicating evil, till my last breath. My bow drawn, no turning back...

t_ch: …也当一心不乱，破邪显正。
t_en: ...My heart shall remain unmoved.

t_ch: 贯彻「忍道」者，即为忍侠。在下……
t_en: Whoever follows the way of the ninja is a ninja. I...

t_ch: 已做出决定。
t_en: I've made my decision.

t_ch: <size=36>银河忍法帖•前尘•影事录</size>\n 终
t_en: <size=36>Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: Past Reverie</size>\nThe End

t_ch: CUT——绝妙，绝妙！{NICKNAME}演员，日后你定能成为如我一般的大导演。
t_en: And, CUT—! Fabulous, absolutely fabulous! Actor {NICKNAME}, you'll surely become a director as great as me in the future!

t_ch: 这些记忆足以创造出摧毁模糊的爆点，来为这出荒诞的猴戏画上句号。而在此之前……
t_en: These memories are enough to create a sensational hit that will destroy ambiguity and bring a close to this absurd monkey show. But before that...

t_ch: 另一边，为高潮准备的前奏曲也已就绪了——
t_en: The prelude prepared for the climax is all ready elsewhere...

t_ch: 大功告成！如此一来，邪忍的阵法就被破坏。
t_en: Success! This way, the Evil Ninja's matrix can finally be broken.

t_ch: 缭乱•忍者，今天的试炼改为…击溃叛忍！
t_en: Dazzling Ninja, there has been a change to your trial today. I now ask you to... vanquish those traitors!

t_ch: 是！就让在下为大师展示一番，方才领悟的缭乱•忍法吧。
t_en: Understood! I shall demonstrate for Master the Dazzling Ninjutsu I just learned!

t_ch: 警告：C<unbreak>11</unbreak>通道有未授权人员出现，请安保人猿开启防卫装置。
t_en: Warning: Unauthorized personnel detected in Corridor C<unbreak>11</unbreak>. Security Apes to activate security measures at once.

t_ch: 邪忍要在此处布下阵法，用大师交给在下的忍•科学，为即将到来的忍侠铺平道路吧！
t_en: The Evil Ninja is about to set a matrix here. Using the ninja tech left to me by Master, I shall pave the way for those Ninja Heroes that are soon to arrive!

t_ch: 警告：C<unbreak>11</unbreak>通道防卫系统疑似出现故障，请技术猿尽快排查。
t_en: Warning: Corridor C<unbreak>11</unbreak>'s security system appears to have malfunctioned. Technical Apes to troubleshoot at once.

t_ch: 警告：C<unbreak>11</unbreak>通道防卫系统出现大规模失控。
t_en: Warning: Corridor C<unbreak>11</unbreak>'s security system has largely gone out of control.

t_ch: 警告：C<unbreak>11</unbreak>通道防卫系统已瘫痪，C<unbreak>11</unbreak>通道…
t_en: Warning: Corridor C<unbreak>11</unbreak>'s security system is no longer functional. Corridor C<unbreak>11</unbreak>...

t_ch: 乱破同学，你的「忍•科学」还没完成吗？
t_en: Rappa, are you not done with your ninja tech yet?

t_ch: 稍等片刻，银河忍法帖有云：「快手织纱无好布，急火炖肉炖不熟」。
t_en: Patience. As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "Hasty knitting produces poor fabric, as raging fires fail to cook meat through."

t_ch: ——完成了！银河忍法千变万化，此乃「超•忍•卷轴」！
t_en: Ha— Done! The Cosmic ninjutsu is ever-changing, so I present to you the Super Ninja Scroll!

t_ch: 在下已将方才的记忆•忍法注于其中。若虾蟇•忍者所言无误，这便是邪祟们的介错之刃。
t_en: I have added the memory from earlier into this. If Ninja Gama does not lie, this will become the blade to slay those fiendlings.

t_ch: 嗯，只要将这些含有「忍者」模因病毒的记忆投入联觉梦境，就可以覆盖睡蕉小猴在梦境中的存在。
t_en: As long as we insert memories containing the ninja memetic virus into the Synesthesia Dreamscape, it will overwrite the existence of Slumbernana Monkey in the dream.

t_ch: 飞龙•忍者，{NICKNAME}•忍者。拜托两位同行，和在下一同终结邪祟•总长的颠倒•梦想吧！
t_en: Ninja Hiryū, Ninja {NICKNAME}, I'm counting on the two of you to aid me in ending the Fiendling Chief's reversed dream!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，折纸大学与流梦礁的人们还在危险中，准备出发吧…蕉。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, the people in Paperfold University and Dreamflux Reef are still in grave danger. Let's set off... bana.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}•忍者，还有何事？此时此刻容不得耽搁。
t_en: Ninja {NICKNAME}, is there anything else the matter? This is no time to be dawdling.

t_ch: 关于你的记忆蕉…
t_en: Bana, about your memories...

t_ch: 日后再谈吧，与梦土千百众生的安危相比，在下的往事不值一提。
t_en: That's a story for another time. Nothing's more important than ensuring the safety of the countless people on this land of dreams.

t_ch: 关于「超•忍•卷轴」蕉…
t_en: Bana, about the Super Ninja Scroll...

t_ch: 在下已将虾蟇•忍者提炼的往事灌注于缭乱•忍法的异彩之中，令此物在邪恶国度爆发四散，便可破除邪忍阵法——此乃在下曾经修习过的忍•科学。
t_en: I have infused all the memories that Ninja Gama extracted into Dazzling Ninjutsu's colors. Spread this all over the evil realm, and it shall break the Evil Ninja's matrix. This is the ninja tech I previously studied.

t_ch: 没事了蕉。
t_en: It's nothing, bana.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}•忍者，快些动身吧，只有我等忍者才能扑灭燃烧梦土的不知火。
t_en: Ninja {NICKNAME}, we should get moving now. The nether fire that ravages the land of dreams can only be extinguished by ninjas like us.

t_ch: 一台平凡的摄像机，若不是出自忆者之手，你很难想象这东西能将你们送往另一片梦境。
t_en: An ordinary camera. Had it not been made by a Memokeeper, it'd be hard to imagine that this thing could send you to another dreamscape.

t_ch: 你看着取景器中的画面，似乎有一只两栖动物的眼睛——它正在注视着你。你的耳边响起了熟悉的声音——
t_en: You peer through the viewfinder and spot what seems like the eye of an amphibian staring back at you. A familiar voice echoes in your ears—

t_ch: 演员们，准备好开始最后的演出了吗？
t_en: Actors, are you ready for the final act?

t_ch: ACTION，出发蕉！
t_en: Action! Let's go, bana!

t_ch: 众忍进击，狩猎开始！
t_en: Charge with me, ninjas! Let the hunt begin!

t_ch: CUT，先等一下蕉。
t_en: Cut! Hold on a sec, bana.

t_ch: 你中止了即将开始的拍摄——但为了不让你扮演的角色从忍者英雄变成猴子，得快点做好出镜的准备。
t_en: You halted the upcoming shoot — but to avoid turning your ninja hero role into a monkey, you need to get camera-ready fast.

t_ch: 这里是哪…我刚刚不是在上课吗？
t_en: What is this place... Wasn't I just in class?

t_ch: 香蕉、丛林…都去哪了……
t_en: Where have the... bananas and forest gone...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，丹恒！还有…乱破小姐？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, Dan Heng! And... Miss Rappa?

t_ch: 哟，琉璃•忍者！哟，银枪•修罗殿下！
t_en: Yo, Ninja Ruri! Yo, Silvergun Shura!

t_ch: 他宝贝的，阵仗搞得比我们还大。
t_en: Forkin' hell, they are making more of a scene than we are.

t_ch: 怎么会…如此伟大的愿景，怎会败给一群不及格的薪柴……
t_en: How can it be... How could such mighty aspirations be brought down by a bunch of failed kindling...

t_ch: 邪祟•总长。别再用污言秽语羞辱人们了，忍道绝无高低贵贱之分——
t_en: Fiendling Chief, stop insulting others with your filthy language. The way of the ninja does not discriminate between classes...

t_ch: 寻觅「忍道」者，即为忍徒。秉持「忍道」者，即为「忍者」。贯彻「忍道」者…即为忍侠！
t_en: One who seeks the way of the ninja is a Ninja Initiate. One who upholds the way of the ninja is a Ninja. And one who lives by the way of the ninja... is a Ninja Hero!

t_ch: …听不懂蕉。
t_en: ...I don't understand, bana.

t_ch: 我也听不懂…不是，别跟他废话了，原始博士养的猴子，你说再多也没用。
t_en: Me neither... Wait, no more nonsense. There's no point in continuing the conversation with a monkey brought up by Dr. Primitive.

t_ch: 你们打算怎么处理这个家伙？
t_en: Have you decided on what to do with this guy?

t_ch: 当然是先折磨一顿。哈，拿皮带蘸盐水抽他个半天，把公司给我用过的狠货全上一遍。
t_en: Torture is definitely on the menu. Hah, whip him with a belt soaked in saltwater and serve him everything that the IPC once used on me.

t_ch: 邪祟•总长罪孽深重，必当以严刑相待，但并非是要其忏悔，而是为了——
t_en: The Fiendling Chief is guilty of multiple sins and deserves punishment. However, repentance is not what we seek, instead...

t_ch: 让他交代御猿•邪忍的去向。/让他交代原始博士的去向。
t_en: Make him tell us where Evil Ninja Osaru is. / Make him tell us where Dr. Primitive is.

t_ch: 哟，喜欢装死？看看待会儿在长满铁刺儿的香蕉前你还能不能装死啊？
t_en: Yo, you enjoy playing dead? Let's see if you can still play dead in the face of a banana covered with thorns!

t_ch: 好了，牛仔演员，不必再跟玩偶对戏了。
t_en: Alright, cowboy actor, you don't have to continue acting with that puppet.

t_ch: 玩偶？你是小可爱吧，你那蛤蟆都比他更像玩偶。
t_en: A puppet? You lil' fudgehead, even your toad looks more like a puppet than he does.

t_ch: 唉，你把副导演弄伤心了。这粗鄙的台词风格真得改改才行。
t_en: You've hurt the feelings of the assistant director. You really should work on changing your crude way of delivering lines.

t_ch: 你要想拷打一个道具，我没意见。但某只在阿斯德纳边境刚醒过来的猩猩，应该已经准备启航了吧。
t_en: Go ahead if you really want to torture a prop. But a certain gorilla who has just awakened at the border of Asdana is probably about to depart.

t_ch: 银枪•修罗殿下，在下的超•听力无法捕捉到邪祟的声响了，虾蟇•忍者所言非虚。
t_en: Silvergun Shura, even with my super hearing, I'm no longer able to detect the sounds of the fiendling. Perhaps Ninja Gama is right.

t_ch: 让他给跑了？
t_en: He escaped?

t_ch: 邪祟，实在卑鄙！
t_en: A truly despicable fiendling!

t_ch: 他宝贝的，费了这么大功夫，最后扑了个空？
t_en: Forkin' hell! That muddle-fudger still got away even after all our effort?

t_ch: …也罢。
t_en: ...Forget it.

t_ch: 姐们儿，这么淡定？你天天把那什么屑人挂在嘴边，恨得死去活来，现在又无所谓了？
t_en: Gal, why are you so calm? You're always talking about how much you hate that scum. Why are you so unconcerned right now?

t_ch: 长夜漫漫，忍侠的仇恨，应由忍侠封藏。毗乃昆尼已迎来太平盛世，眼下，就让梦土的芸芸众生拥抱阳光吧。
t_en: This night is long. The hatred of a Ninja Hero should be borne solely by themselves. Since Pinecany has finally ushered in a period of peace and prosperity, then let the mortal beings of this land of dreams embrace the sun once more.

t_ch: 仇恨总有一天会消解，但人们心中的忍道…不会。
t_en: The hatred in one's heart might dissipate one day, but the way of the ninja within their hearts will never be forgotten... ever.

t_ch: 让他交代御猿•邪忍的去向。
t_en: Make him tell us where Evil Ninja Osaru is.

t_ch: 让他交代原始博士的去向。
t_en: Make him tell us where Dr. Primitive is.

t_ch: 乱破，你知晓自己的*忍道*了吗？
t_en: Rappa, have you found your own way of the ninja?

t_ch: 在下的忍道，当然就是成为缭乱•忍侠啊。
t_en: Of course, becoming the Dazzling Ninja is my way of the ninja.

t_ch: 不，这可算不上忍道，忍道是忍者愿为之贯彻一生的事物。
t_en: No, that cannot be considered the way of the ninja. The way of the ninja is something a ninja lives by for the rest of their life.

t_ch: 那…打倒邪忍？
t_en: Then... defeating the Evil Ninja?

t_ch: 你早晚会击败御猿•邪忍的，那之后呢？成为缭乱•忍侠只是为了打败仇敌吗？
t_en: You'll eventually defeat Evil Ninja Osaru one day. Then, what happens next? Is your reason for becoming the Dazzling Ninja solely for defeating your enemies?

t_ch: 但这世间的邪忍绝不止他，对吧？
t_en: But he's not the only Evil Ninja in this realm, right?

t_ch: 当然，在银河忍界中，恶徒如绮罗星般纷繁。神明无暇顾及众生，拥有超凡忍•力的忍者•大师亦在互相争斗，这便是末法之世。
t_en: Of course... In the Cosmic Ninja Realm, evildoers are as abundant as the glittering stars. The gods have no spare attention to protect the mortals and the powerful ninja masters with extraordinary ninjutsu powers constantly fighting against one another. That is the Mappou Age of the Dharma.

t_ch: 那么，在下的忍道便是——
t_en: Then, my way of the ninja shall be...

t_ch: 祓除万恶，不死不休，纵使箭在弦上，永不复还，也当一心不乱，破邪显正！
t_en: Eradicating evil, till my last breath. My bow drawn, no turning back. My heart shall remain unmoved until evil has been purged and justice enacted!

t_ch: ——直至，末法世终。
t_en: Till the end of the Mappou Age.

t_ch: CUT！完美！
t_en: CUT! Perfect!

t_ch: 原来你们遇到了这么刺激的事情…真是的，下次这种冒险一定要带上我啊！
t_en: You guys actually experienced something so exciting... Seriously, bring me along on such adventures next time!

t_ch: 明明是你自己走掉的。
t_en: It was clearly you who went off on your own.

t_ch: 算了，反正我也在你们看不到的地方大展身手了。你们能这么顺利地解决问题，可少不了本姑娘的功劳！
t_en: Forget it. Anyway, I was also able to showcase my capabilities while you guys weren't present. I definitely played a big part in your being able to resolve the situation so successfully.

t_ch: 真的假的？
t_en: Really?

t_ch: 当、当然是真的！
t_en: O—Of course!

t_ch: 那你牛大了。
t_en: Wow, you're the best.

t_ch: 怎么感觉你阴阳怪气的……
t_en: Hey, why do you sound so snarky...

t_ch: 不愧是琉璃•忍者！
t_en: As expected of Ninja Ruri!

t_ch: 过奖了，{NICKNAME}•忍者。
t_en: You're too kind, Ninja {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 学术研讨会已经结束了，真正的代理校长与老师们也回来了。
t_en: The academic conference has concluded, and the actual acting dean and teachers are back.

t_ch: 校方并没有把事态扩大化…或许是芮克先生取走了部分当事人的记忆。
t_en: The university did not escalate matters... Perhaps it's because Mr. Reca extracted a portion of the people's memories.

t_ch: 真是可怕，咱不会也被他拿走了什么记忆吧？我可不想再失忆了。
t_en: How scary, could he have taken our memories as well? I don't want to lose any more memories.

t_ch: 不过多亏了他，彩梦校庆也能继续重新举办了——这次总能玩个痛快了吧！
t_en: However, it's all thanks to him that the Dreamlight Anniversary is going ahead once again. I hope that we can finally have some fun this time!

t_ch: 嗯，听说知更鸟小姐要在广场主持新的开幕式，我们去看看吧。
t_en: Yes, and I heard that Miss Robin is going to host the new opening ceremony in the Plaza. Let's head over and take a look.

t_ch: 嗨，蒙塔娜，你还好吗？
t_en: Hi Montana, are you feeling alright?

t_ch: 哟，三月•忍者阁下。
t_en: Yo, Ninja March.

t_ch: 欸？什么？
t_en: Huh? What?
